title: Jango Moves to Carry Out Kuro’s Orders
description: On pages 10–13, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My men...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mornin'

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: current captain of kuro neko pirate fleet 1. 2 JANGO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's gooo men!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeaa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Okay! We're done!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We've sprayed a massive amount of oil here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Now those bastards won't be able to get up this slope

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is the most effective way to battle them!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No matter what, we must guard this slope with our lives

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Just don't fall down there yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Or else you're screwed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yep!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't worry!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I have a lot of confi- dance in myself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The sun is up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The Pirates are going to come soon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We've reached the shore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Let's go, every- body!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Our plan is to destroy the village!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Captain! There are two strange looking ships over there!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't mind them, they wouldn't have treasure anyways

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
